title: Department Manager Vacancy at Domino's India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Domino's India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
